positive: A minimalist, geometric portrait of a stylized woodland creature, such as a fox or deer, composed entirely of abstract celestial bodies, geometric line art, and neon glowing constellations. The central figure must have a strong, clean silhouette against a deep indigo and midnight blue gradient background. Incorporate radiating starburst effects and subtle bioluminescence glows. The overall style should blend elegant sacred geometry with modern vaporwave aesthetics, resembling high-end lithograph or stencil art. Use high contrast, limited palette of electric blue, gold leaf, and deep black. Central composition, suitable for apparel printing, highly detailed, vector style, clean edges, 8k resolution, isolated background.
